lessons: WRONG fixed: the Facebook ~7.6M figure was attributed to DataReportal Digital 2026 and labeled an '18+ ad-tool figure', both incorrect. DataReportal's 2026 Israel Facebook ad reach is 5.05M; 7.6M is NapoleonCat's all-ages count. Re-sourced (lead with 5.05M ad reach, 7.6M all-ages NapoleonCat for context) and fixed the methodology note. Also softened the 'Facebook is the clear #1' framing: Facebook (5.05M) and Instagram (5.00M) are now tied, YouTube (7.01M) is largest, Facebook's edge is groups/community not scale.

CRITICAL coverage added: a Step 2b on AI-generated-content disclosure (2026). Meta (FB/IG/Threads) and TikTok require disclosure of realistic AI visuals/audio and auto-detect+label via C2PA Content Credentials; repeated non-disclosure -> demotion/ad rejection/restriction. Essential for a content-generation skill.

MAJOR added: 2026 Instagram ranking-signal shift (watch time + DM 'sends' dominant, likes downgraded; carousels lead engagement while Reels lead reach) and TikTok retention-over-length nuance (~21-34s entertainment, 60-90s informative/search).
Fixed (reference): X/Twitter ~1.5M -> ~0.88M (shrinking, about -16% YoY); added YouTube (~7M, largest) and emerging Threads (~0.35M) to the platforms table.

Verified CORRECT (no change): Instagram ~5M, TikTok ~4.49M (18+), LinkedIn ~3.1M (exact DataReportal 2026 matches); caption limits (TikTok 4,000 / Instagram 2,200 / 30 hashtags); 1080x1920 9:16 specs; TikTok 15-60s + Hebrew-audio heuristics; the TikTok-JV Jan-2026 caveat; RTL caption formatting; posting_scheduler.py (no bugs, no hardcoded dates, correct Sun-Thu logic).

CRITICAL fixed (Expert): added a gotcha that an external link in the CAPTION costs organic reach (Meta ~15% reach tax on Instagram caption links; Facebook suppresses external-link feed posts; TikTok keeps users on-platform), put links in the first comment or bio. Included the accurate nuance that the phrase 'link in bio' does NOT hurt reach (Mosseri debunked that myth), correcting a common misconception, only the clickable in-caption URL is penalized.

MAJOR fixed (Expert): posting_scheduler.py still hardcoded TikTok 'Short video (15-60s)', contradicting the updated retention guidance, changed it to 'match length to intent: ~21-34s entertainment / 60-90s informative'. Also added Thursday to the FB/IG/LinkedIn best_days for full Sun-Thu coverage.
Fixed (Judge): the reference's LinkedIn 'Highest per-capita globally' superlative is overstated (UAE/US/UK/Canada rank higher), softened to 'one of the highest per-capita globally'.

Deferred (MINOR): note that Instagram organic reach has compressed (to roughly seven percent for sub-100K accounts, down from about twelve percent in 2023); reconcile the reference NapoleonCat all-ages framing vs DataReportal ad-reach across both files more fully.
